---
name: Documentation Request
about: Request for comprehensive documentation
title: "Add comprehensive setup and synchronization documentation"
labels: documentation, enhancement
---

## Overview
The Custom-taskbar-timer-app currently lacks comprehensive documentation for users wanting to set up and configure the synchronization between desktop (Electron) and mobile (React Native) versions.

## Problem
New users may struggle to:
- Understand the initial setup process for both desktop and mobile apps
- Configure the taskbar timer synchronization between platforms
- Troubleshoot common sync issues

## Proposed Solution
Create detailed documentation that includes:
- **Setup Guide**: Step-by-step instructions for installing and configuring both the Electron desktop app and React Native mobile app
- **Synchronization Guide**: How to enable, configure, and manage real-time sync between devices
- **Shortcuts Reference**: Comprehensive list of keyboard shortcuts and their mobile equivalents
- **Troubleshooting**: Common issues and their solutions
- **Architecture Overview**: High-level explanation of how the sync mechanism works

## Deliverables
- [ ] README.md enhancements
- [ ] docs/ folder with detailed guides
- [ ] Sync troubleshooting guide
- [ ] Quick start guide for new users

This will significantly improve the user experience and reduce support questions.
